zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Kynaston or Knutson於大約1521年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾紹頓時，他的父親Thomas Kynaston24歲，母親Alice Harnage20歲。他於大約1543年與Maria Hanmer在英國威爾斯福林爾韓麥結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Kynaston or Knutson于大约1521年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾紹頓时，他的父亲Thomas Kynaston24岁，母亲Alice Harnage20岁。他于大约1543年与Maria Hanmer在英国威尔斯福林爾韓麥结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Kynaston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Kynaston: in Kinnerley (Shropshire), in Hentland (Herefordshire), or in Much Marcle (Herefordshire).

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (Israeli): from Hebrew or ‘light’, a Hebraicized form of various original Ashkenazic surnames.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 柯, see   Ke   1.
Chinese: Hokkien form of the surname 胡, see   Hu   1.

variants.name: Ke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Heng, Yong, Bin, Song, Yan, Zhi, Cheng, Chih-Ming, Chun-Yen, Fan, Fong, Gang.  Vietnamese Lan, Hai, Hoa, Le Van, Mui, Tuy.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 柯, meaning ‘bough, stalk’ in Chinese: (i) from the first element of the personal name Ke Lu (柯盧), personal name of a prince of the state of Wu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the first element of the placename Ke Ze (柯澤), the name of a fief (located in Shandong province) granted to an official in the state of Qi during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) traced back to the Qiang ethnic group in ancient western China and the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iv) adopted as a surname by the Ke Ba (柯拔) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Knutson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Knute, Selmer, Ingard, Jarl, Jorgen, Juel, Nels, Obert, Tryg, Algot, Egil.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Knutsson: patronymic from the personal name Knut (see Knudsen ).
Americanized form of Norwegian   Knutsen  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Knuteson
meanings: Variant of   Knutson  , a surname of Swedish or Norwegian origin.

variants.name: Knudsen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Knud, Niels, Holger, Jorgen, Ove, Alf, Alfhild, Anders, Baard, Berger, Einer.
Danish, Norwegian, and North German: patronymic from the Danish personal name Knud, derived from Old Norse Knútr meaning ‘knot’. Knud was a Danish royal name, Latinized as Canutus.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Kynaston or Knutson was born about 1521, in Shotton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Kynaston, was 24 and his mother, Alice Harnage, was 20. He married Maria Hanmer about 1543, in Hanmer, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters.

fr.Of Hanmer,Flintshire,England: Hanmer, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Kynaston or Knutson est né environ 1521, à Shotton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Kynaston, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alice Harnage, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Maria Hanmer environ 1543, à Hanmer, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Kynaston or Knutson um 1521 in Shotton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Kynaston 24 und seine Mutter Alice Harnage 20. Er hat um 1543 in Hanmer, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom Maria Hanmer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter.

ht.Of Hanmer,Flintshire,England: Hanmer, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Kynaston or Knutson è nato il circa 1521 nel Shotton, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Kynaston, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Alice Harnage, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Maria Hanmer circa 1543, nel Hanmer, Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Kynaston or Knutsonが約1521年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアショットオンで生まれた時，父Thomas Kynastonは24歳，母Alice Harnageは20歳であった。約1543年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアハンマーでMaria Hanmerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Kynaston or Knutson(이)가 대략 1521년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 쇼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Kynaston(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Harnage(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1543년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르 핸머에서 Maria Hanmer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Kynaston or Knutson nasceu aproximadamente 1521, em Shotton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Kynaston, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Alice Harnage, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Maria Hanmer aproximadamente 1543, em Hanmer, Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 8 filhas.

ro.Of Hanmer,Flintshire,England: Hanmer, Flintshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Kynaston or Knutson родился около 1521 г. в местности шоттон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Kynaston было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Harnage, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Hanmer около 1543 г. в местности ханмир, флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Kynaston or Knutson nació aproximadamente 1521, en Shotton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Kynaston, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Alice Harnage, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Maria Hanmer aproximadamente 1543, en Hanmer, Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas.
